title: lagascea decipiens var. glandulosa
intro: Lagascea decipiens var. glandulosa, also known as Mexican tarragon or false tarragon, is a perennial plant species in the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Lagascea decipiens var. glandulosa include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
